homeData.heroDescription: Full-Stack Developer specializing in MERN Stack & React Native. Transforming ideas into scalable, high-performance applications with modern design principles.
homeData.name: HaFiz Abrar Iqbal

aboutData.name: Hafiz Abrar Iqbal
aboutData.title: Software Engineer | UI/UX Designer
aboutData.bio:
I am a detail-oriented Software Engineering student at SZABIST with a passion for bridging the gap between complex backend logic and intuitive frontend design. With a Graphic Design certification from SMIT, I bring a unique perspective to web and mobile development, ensuring every project is as visually stunning as it is functionally robust.

Currently, I am focusing on my Final Year Project, AjwaHub, an e-commerce platform that showcases my expertise in React Native and full-stack development. My goal is to create digital experiences that are scalable, efficient, and user-centric.
aboutData.quote: I craft digital experiences where elegant code meets stunning design — building scalable, high-performance solutions that users love and businesses trust.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Software Engineering
education.description: Currently in my final semester, focusing on Software Development Lifecycles, Programming Languages, and System Design.
Completed my higher secondary education from S.M. Govt Science College, building a solid foundation in Mathematics, Physics, and Chemistry that paved the way for my Software Engineering journey.
